title: tragacantha tetragonocarpa
intro: Tragacantha tetragonocarpa, also known as the goat's thorn or bushy goat's thorn, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to Europe, Africa, and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Tragacantha tetragonocarpa include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical treatments.
